name: 达妮埃拉·马格纳尼·惠勒
awards: 2026年 第76届柏林国际电影节 柏林纪录片奖 特别荣誉 残存的感性
2026年 第76届柏林国际电影节 柏林纪录片奖 最佳纪录片奖 (提名) 残存的感性
name_full: 达妮埃拉·马格纳尼·惠勒 Daniela Magnani Hüller
introduction: Daniela Magnani Hüller is a German-Brazilian filmmaker born in Munich in 1995. After completing her Abitur, she lived in Rio de Janeiro before studying documentary filmmaking at the University of Television and Film Munich. She has written, directed and edited multiple short films. In 2023 she received the DOK.Talent Award at DOK.fest Munich. Sometimes, I Imagine Them All at a Party is her autobiographical, documentary feature debut.
